title: Immersive Cursedness
body:
Have you ever used Immersive Portals and thought *this isn't cursed enough*? Then this mod is for you! It uses advanced cursedness to deliver immersiveness straight to the client. And uses intelligent packet spam to ensure clients don't even have to install the mod themselves!

# Features
* View the other dimension via the portal
* Place, destroy and interact with blocks on the other side
* Server side only, no client mod needed.
* Toggle able per player via `/portal`
* Runs mostly off-thread, shouldn't cause server lag

*If you don't need this mod server side only, use the great immersive portals mod instead ([fabric](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/immersive-portals-mod)/[forge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/immersive-portals-for-forge))*
